name: LGL GROUP INC
summary: The LGL Group, Inc. is a Delaware-incorporated holding company engaged in services, merchant investment, and manufacturing. It operates through two segments: Electronic Instruments (via Precise Time and Frequency, LLC, designing and selling electronic instrument products) and Merchant Investment (investment income, gains/losses, and fee income from syndicated investments via LGL Systems Acquisition Holding Company, LLC). The company holds approximately $41.55 million in cash and marketable securities as of December 31, 2025.

products.name: Electronic Instruments
products.description: Precision electronic instrument products designed and sold by Precise Time and Frequency, LLC through organic R&D and strategic partnerships.

products.name: Merchant Investment Services
products.description: Investment income, gains/losses from transactions, and fee income from syndicated investments via special purpose vehicles.

partnerships.partner_name: LGL Systems Acquisition Holding Company, LLC
partnerships.description: Partially owned subsidiary serving as sponsor for direct investing efforts including SPAC vehicles.
Cable operator partnership in Kansas to buy telephone lines from Sprint and commercialize DirecTV.
